headline: Dollar Tree upgraded on earnings upside potential despite ongoing traffic woes
summary: Investing.com -- Dollar Tree received a pair of analyst upgrades on Wednesday, with brokerages pointing to improving consumer sentiment, tariff-related tailwinds and a stronger earnings outlook, even as store traffic remains under pressure.

headline: Dollar Tree Shares Edge Higher After Analysts Raise Price Targets (DLTR)
summary: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) shares rose 0. 1% in pre-market trading on Wednesday after several Wall Street firms adopted a more positive outlook on the discount retailer, led by JPMorgan’s decision to raise its price target following a meeting with management.

headline: Merck To Rally More Than 16%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall St analysts changed outlook on top names. KBW cut AON PT to $400, Barclay's cut T PT to $24, MS cut ROL PT to $65, GS cut SAM PT to $169, BofA raised ALLY PT to $53, Citi raised EW PT to $110, Wells Fargo raised MRK PT to $150, Jefferies raised ENVA PT.

headline: Raymond James Upgrades Dollar Tree to Outperform, Announces $140 Price Target
summary: Raymond James  analyst Bobby Griffin   upgrades Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) from Market Perform to Outperform and announces $140 price target.

headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Dollar Tree to Neutral, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Kate McShane   upgrades Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) from Sell to Neutral and raises the price target from $105 to $125.
